Name: Dave's Special PLUS V3.61 (MEV+DEA+CD2) R3
Description:
------------------
   VERSION: 3.61 R3
  ------------------

  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
  *** BOTH HOST AND CLIENTS REQUIRE CD2 UPDATE 18 or NEWER  ***
  ***            AND THE CORRECT MEV/DEA VERSION            ***
  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

  PLEASE DOUBLE CHECK YOUR PAKS BEFORE REPORTING AN ISSUE
  -------------------------------------------------------
  Clients without CD2 update 18 (or newer) will see desync or crash.
  Clients without MEVv5_4 (or newer) will have invisible enemies.
  Clients without DEA_b00.3.3 (or newer) will have invisible enemies.
  
  Dave's Special with FC timers to increase pressure.

- First resup 40, rest 60
- Enemy cap 210 > 240 for 4p, swarmers 120 > 180
- EnemyDamageModifier increased to match FC
- ECM increased to match FC
- Wave/NormalWave interval/size changed to match FC, fatwave reduced slightly
- Stationary Diff upped a bit
- Reduced wavespawner intervals. Main Spawner 55>45. New unit 110>90. Bulks 300>250

R2
- Adjusted goomba hut spawn freq
- Seeker Sprout max spawn count 1, timedilation from 1.6 to 0.8

R3
- Remove Mini Bulk Spawninator from enemy pool DuringDefend (can still spawn via 250s bulk spawner)
